title: Cracked Ice
description: The ice looks safe… until you step on it.
body:
# Cracked Ice

Cracked Ice is a vanilla-friendly mod that adds a fragile variant of ice. At first glance it looks just like normal ice, but once you step on it, the surface begins to crack and can eventually break beneath you, dropping you into the freezing water below.

Different entities affect the ice differently depending on their size and movement. Small mobs barely crack it, while heavier mobs, boats, minecarts, and fast movement can quickly make the ice collapse.

Frozen lakes are no longer completely safe — crossing them becomes a small survival challenge that rewards careful movement and planning.

## Features

* Naturally generated Cracked Ice in frozen biomes
* Progressive cracking system
* Different cracking strength depending on entity weight
* Boats and minecarts can crack the ice
* Riding horses creates cracking trails
* Frost Walker prevents cracking
* Ice slowly regenerates over time
* Vanilla-style visuals and mechanics

The mod is designed to feel as close to vanilla Minecraft as possible while making frozen biomes more immersive, dynamic, and dangerous.

---

## Requirements

* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API

## Known Issues

* Multiplayer has not been tested so expect bugs (i will eventually get to it)
* Compatibility with some terrain and world generation mods has not been fully tested

---

## AI Assistance Notice

Parts of this mod were developed with the help of AI-assisted programming tools for prototyping, debugging, and balancing systems. The original concept, design direction, and final decisions were created by me.
